pages.text: The $(item)Village Center Skyseed$() — $(item)5 emeralds$(), an iron ingot, planks and cobblestone. All 13 professions and an iron golem — the whole economy in one throw.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Emeralds and iron both come off a $(item)Rocky$() isle (throw it $(bold)high$() for emeralds).
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

The premium village island: a bell-topped plaza with four trading halls around it, an iron golem on guard, and a villager of $(bold)every$() one of the 13 professions. The complete trading economy in one throw.

$(bold)The four halls$()$(br)$(li)Farm hall — farmer, shepherd, fletcher, butcher$(li)Smith hall — armorer, weaponsmith, toolsmith$(li)Scholar hall — librarian, cartographer, cleric$(li)Craft hall — mason, leatherworker, fisherman
Each villager has a bed and a job site, so the hall fills with trades on its own. The $(item)iron golem$() guards them — raids are disabled on Skyseed worlds, but mobs at night are not.

$(bold)A late-game reward$()$(br)Costs $(item)5 emeralds$(), an iron ingot, planks and cobblestone. You'll want an established Rocky or Ancient mining run before this is within reach — but it pays back the whole economy at once.
